name: John Fedchock
abstract: John William Fedchock (born September 18, 1957) is an American jazz trombonist, bandleader, and arranger.

interviews.title: John Fedchock interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 28, 2015

concerts.label: Standard Time with Michael Feinstein: The Art of Song
Standard Time with Michael Feinstein: Celebrating David Raksin and Classic Film Songs

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Tiberi
about_quotes.evidence: I’m not really considered an arranger like John Fedchock or Alan Broadbent... Fedchock did a lot of arrangements also that well they were great.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Tiberi interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 30, 2022
